projectDescription: A Minecraft mod that adds 70+ new biomes to the Overworld and Nether with custom blocks, plants, and world generation.
keyFeatures: 70+ new biomes across Overworld, caves, and Nether dimensions
Custom blocks including wood types, plants, flowers, and decorative blocks
Configurable biome toggles and client-side options
Multi-platform support for Fabric and NeoForge mod loaders
Custom world generation features including trees, foliage placers, and decorators
Unique cave biomes with special blocks like Prismarite and Redstone formations
Integration with Biolith for biome placement
publicApiSurface: RUBiomes - 70+ biome resource keys (ALPHA_GROVE, ANCIENT_DELTA, etc.)
RUBlocks - Block registrations including wood sets, natural sets, plants, and cave blocks
RUItems - Item registrations including food items and utilities
RUEntityTypes - Custom entity types (boats and chest boats)
WoodSet - API for custom wood type sets
NaturalSet - API for natural block sets (branches, shrubs, saplings)
